<hr>

<h2>01. About me</h2>

<p>
I'm <b>Elias Onsihuay</b>, an engineer who builds things that actually work — from the browser to the board.
</p>

<p>
Founder of <b><a href="https://kodhu.com">Kodhu</a></b>, a global engineering studio. We ship web platforms, AI systems, dedicated servers, IoT devices, custom FPV drones and hardware that goes beyond the screen. I like building things that didn't exist before.
</p>

```ts
class Developer {
  name     = 'Elias Onsihuay';
  alias    = 'KI3F';
  company  = 'Kodhu';
  location = 'Peru / Remote';
  
  domains  = ['Software', 'AI', 'IoT', 'FPV Drones', 'Hardware'];
  
  currentlyBuilding = 'Things I can not talk about yet';
  alwaysOpen        = 'Ambitious projects with great people';
  
  openToWork = () => true;
}
```

<hr>
